title: Kubernetesclusterconfigurationinventory
content:
# K8sconfiguration ## payment-service
- ：3
- CPU Request/Limit：500m/1000m
- Memory Request/Limit：256MB/512MB
- JVMparameter：-Xms128m -Xmx384m
- databaseconnection：maxPoolSize=20, minIdle=5
- livenessProbe: httpGet /health, timeout=5s, failureThreshold=3
- readinessProbe: httpGet /ready, timeout=3s, initialDelaySeconds=10 ## order-service
- ：2
- CPU Request/Limit：500m/1000m
- Memory Request/Limit：512MB/1GB
- Redisconfiguration：host=redis-cluster-01, port=6379
- livenessProbe: httpGet /health, timeout=5s, failureThreshold=3 ## notification-service
- ：2
- CPU Request/Limit：250m/500m
- Memory Request/Limit：256MB/512MB
- email：
- ：500/
- livenessProbe: httpGet /health, timeout=3s, failureThreshold=3 ## gateway-service
- ：3
- sessionAffinity: ClientIP
- readinessProbe: httpGet /ready, timeout=3s, initialDelaySeconds=5
- actualstarttime：approximately30seconds
author: Ops Team
